primary.name: Nexynth Navy
primary.usage: Primary brand color, headers, logo on light backgrounds, buttons

primaryDark.name: Deep Midnight
primaryDark.usage: Dark mode backgrounds, body text on light surfaces

accent.name: Synth Gold
accent.usage: Accent highlights, logo mark, CTAs, dividers

accentLight.name: Soft Gold
accentLight.usage: Hover states, subtle highlights on dark backgrounds

background.name: Warm Ivory
background.usage: Light mode page background, print stationery

surface.name: Pure Surface
surface.usage: Cards, email backgrounds, business card base

accessibility.accentOnPrimary: Use white or ivory text on navy buttons
accessibility.notes: Do not use gold text on ivory for body copy — insufficient contrast
